title: Sanji’s Family Name Returns
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on sanji’s family name returns within the Capone Bege Takes Sanji storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WAAH... Waooo, WAOOF...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Everyone's okay after all...!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Father!! Mother!! All my friends and Rela- Tives!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: When I saw the the the she shape the town was in, my heart nearly stopped!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Everyone's okay thanks to the "straw hat pirates."

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: It's been so many years since you've come home, pekoms.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Damn it all!! I had no idea this was happening...!!

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Curse you, hun- Dred beasts Pirates' [Jack]!!!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Over there!! It's the guys from the big mom pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: That's pekoms. A long time ago, he was well known for his youthful indiscretion. Do you know him?

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Ahhh, I see... so he's a mink too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: gyaah!!! They must have caught wind of us coming here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Which means they must be after me-!!! Please, I'm begging you! You wouldn't hand me over to them, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Some of the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You were our [Trump card] for defeating Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But since Luffy and the others took him down already, you are just excess baggage as far as I'm concerned!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How rude!! How can you talk to your friend that way?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Friend? Don't push your luck...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What did you do to big mom anyways?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well... she had commissioned some specific research from me... research that didn't quite end up bearing any fruit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So I kind of told a small white lie and... took the payment from her for it anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Since I had Doflamingo as a buffer, I figured I'd be pretty much untouchable!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You reap what you sow...

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Well, all we'd have to do to get them off our backs is hand over Caesar....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WHAT?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm gonna find you in the new world and beat the crap out of you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But Luffy already stirred the pot with big mom so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Fishman Island is under my protection now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yeah, they did wreck our ship, after all....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey, black leg... how about you and I team up and get rid of those two, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nami-san, you stay here with everyone else.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: brook, you come with me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes, sir.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: C'mon black leg... assassination is our best option here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If you're not willing to face the consequences of your actions, then I suggest you shut the hell up.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WHAT BUSINESS...

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Do the big mom pirates have here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Your presence here is making everyone anxious...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: After what the people of this country have gone through...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Their bodies and their hearts are covered in scars...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I have nothing to say to you but my thanks...!! GAOOOO!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I had no idea ...that this was happening to my own home town... my birthplace ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And you all are its greatest saviors....!! How can I possibly thank you?

summary: Sanji’s Family Name Returns: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
